summary: REQ-45 requires the Footer.tsx to use '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' as the exact image path. The diff shows Footer.tsx was modified, but the image src used is '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.dim_512x512.png' instead of the required '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png'. All other aspects of the requirement appear to be met: the logo is in the brand area, sized at h-14 (approximately 56px, within the 48–64px range), and other footer content appears preserved.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' as the exact image path in Footer.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the img src is set to '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.dim_512x512.png' instead of the required exact path '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' as specified in the build request constraints.
